sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VYNE Therapeutics Provides Update Regarding Cash Dividend, Reverse Stock Split and Anticipated Timing of Closing of the Proposed Merger with Yarrow Bioscience
feed.summary: VYNE Therapeutics provided an update on its special cash dividend, which was distributed on July 23, 2026, to stockholders of record as of July 22, 2026. The company's 1-for-50 reverse stock split is expected on July 24, 2026, with post-split trading beginning July 27, 2026. The closing of the proposed merger with Yarrow Bioscience, under Nasdaq's final review and approval, is now expected early in the week of July 27, 2026.

feed.title: World Kinect (NYSE: WKC) lifts 2026 EPS outlook after record Q2 gross profit
feed.summary: World Kinect Corporation reported a significant improvement in profitability for Q2 2026, with record gross profit of $365.1 million and GAAP net income of $48.4 million, a stark contrast to a loss in the previous year. The company raised its full-year 2026 Adjusted EPS guidance to $3.20–$3.40 per share, reflecting stronger performance, particularly in its Aviation and Marine segments. Despite a decrease in consolidated sales volume and negative year-to-date operating cash flow, WKC returned capital to shareholders through a 15% dividend increase and share repurchases.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awards RSUs and stock options to director Nilda Mesa
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) director Nilda Mesa received annual non-employee director equity awards on July 22, 2026. These awards include 380 restricted stock units and 1,190 stock options, which are expected to vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders, anticipated for June 25, 2027. Following these awards, Mesa directly holds 5,678 shares of United Therapeutics common stock, and the stock options have an exercise price of $527.0700 and will expire on July 22, 2033.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awards 760 RSUs to board director Judy D. Olian
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) director Judy D. Olian was awarded 760 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an annual non-employee director equity award on July 22, 2026. These RSUs will fully vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders, anticipated on June 25, 2027. Following this transaction, Olian directly holds 760 RSUs and 5,555 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Verastem Inc. (VSTM) holder outlines potential sale of 31,924 common shares

(VSTM), Robert Gagnon, has filed a Form 144 notice indicating a potential sale of up to 31,924 shares of common stock through Jefferies LLC, with an aggregate market value of $188,032.36. These shares originate from previously vested restricted stock units and stock options, and the filing also details two prior sales by Gagnon in May and June 2026.

feed.title: Allen-Based EagleNXT Invests in Ohio Drone Maker Agilis Air
feed.summary: Allen-based drone technology company EagleNXT has made its third strategic investment of the year, backing Ohio-based Agilis Air Inc., a maker of low-cost, modular quadcopter drones. This deal complements EagleNXT's long-endurance fixed-wing systems and expands its product lines without the cost of full acquisition. EagleNXT plans to significantly grow its Allen workforce as it ramps up production across its newly expanded drone and counter-drone offerings.

feed.title: Help in the Heat
feed.summary: Con Edison is urging its New York City and Westchester County customers to check their eligibility for the new Enhanced Energy Assistance Program (EEAP) as temperatures and electricity bills rise. Over 20,000 customers are already receiving discounts up to $168, and one in three households now qualify. The company also highlights its Energy Affordability Program (EAP) and offers energy-saving tips and payment assistance options.

The company also approved a cash dividend for its 7.875% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series F, payable on October 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of October 1, 2026. Wintrust is a financial holding company with $74.7 billion in assets, operating through 16 community bank subsidiaries and various non-bank business units.

feed.title: AMSL, AMAT, KLAC, LRCX: Chipmaking Equipment Stocks Rise On Intel’s CapEx Bump
feed.summary: Intel has significantly increased its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to over $20 billion, up from $18 billion, primarily for chipmaking tools, clean room build-outs, and securing material supplies. This announcement caused shares of major chip-equipment makers like ASML Holding, Lam Research, KLA Corp, and Applied Materials to rise, despite a 'bearish' retail sentiment on Stocktwits. The increased CapEx is driven by strong customer demand signals, particularly from data centers, indicating a robust outlook for the semiconductor industry.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase Increases Substantial Shareholding in Telix Pharmaceuticals to 9.02%
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. and its affiliates have significantly increased their stake in Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (TLX) to 9.02% of voting shares, up from 7.80%, according to a substantial holder notice filed on July 21, 2026. This increase, involving approximately 4.18 million additional ordinary shares, reflects institutional interest in the Australian biopharmaceutical company, particularly within the growing radiopharmaceutical market. However, a large portion of this holding comprises shares held through securities lending and prime brokerage activities, which are temporary or intermediated positions rather than purely strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: 1st Source (NASDAQ: SRCE) Q2 profit climbs to $47.5M on loan growth

The company highlighted an economic outlook with elevated geopolitical risk, uneven growth, and a higher-for-longer interest rate environment, while maintaining strong capital levels with a shareholders' equity-to-assets ratio of 14.15%.

feed.title: Invesco's SPHD ETF offers 4.5% yield with low v...
feed.summary: The Invesco S&P 500 High Dividend Low Volatility ETF (SPHD) provides a 4.5% yield with monthly payouts, catering to income-focused investors looking for steady income and lower risk. Despite potential long-term underperformance in total returns, its low volatility and defensive sector allocations (real estate and financial sectors, with no tech exposure) make it suitable for retirees and those prioritizing dividend stability and capital preservation. The fund's heavy investments in interest-rate-sensitive sectors, however, make it susceptible to interest rate changes.

feed.title: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Stock Could Be Overvalued On Fresh Diabetes Therapy News
feed.summary: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) stock has shown strong past performance but appears overvalued based on current metrics. The company's P/B ratio of 8.2x is significantly higher than the broader biotech industry average, driven by excitement around its diabetes and metabolic therapies. Investors need to assess whether the potential for future revenue from its pipeline justifies the current premium or if the valuation is inflated.

feed.title: Cigna (CI) Expands AI Care Programs For Customers With Chronic Health Needs
feed.summary: Cigna Healthcare is expanding its AI-enabled personalized care management programs for customers with complex or chronic health needs, leveraging artificial intelligence and predictive analytics for earlier and more tailored clinical support. This initiative aims to improve health outcomes and potentially reduce medical costs, aligning with a broader trend in the healthcare industry towards data-driven tools for chronic condition management. For investors, this move highlights Cigna's focus on digital health capabilities and warrants monitoring regarding its impact on customer engagement and medical cost trends.

feed.title: Moody's (MCO) Stock Looks Overvalued With Little Margin Of Safety
feed.summary: Simply Wall St analysis suggests that Moody's (MCO) stock appears overvalued based on both its Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate and P/E ratio. The stock trades about 10% above its intrinsic value estimate of $429 per share and its current P/E of 29.5x is higher than its modeled fair P/E of 17.7x, implying a significant premium. While Moody's long-term performance has been positive, its recent decline and current valuation suggest a lack of safety margin for new investors, depending on the sustained profitability and demand for its credit and analytics businesses.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) Q1 2027 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) reported over $1 billion in Q1 2027 revenue, a 5.7% increase, with diluted EPS at 94 cents, exceeding expectations. This performance was driven by strong DTC growth, particularly from HOKA and UGG brands, which showed robust consumer demand and successful product innovation. The company maintained a focus on premium full-price selling, disciplined inventory management, and strategic investments, reinforcing confidence in its fiscal ’27 outlook despite a dynamic external environment.

feed.title: RBC Capital Remains a Hold on Upwork (UPWK)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Brad Erickson maintained a Hold rating on Upwork (UPWK) with a price target of $9.00, following the company's recent earnings report. Upwork reported a quarterly revenue of $195.48 million and a net profit of $31.46 million for the quarter ending March 31. The analyst has a 4-star rating with a 6.9% average return and 52.02% success rate, focusing on the Communication Services sector.

feed.title: Moody's (MCO) Expands Intapp Partnership To Put Risk Data Inside AI Workflows
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation is expanding its partnership with Intapp to integrate its financial risk intelligence directly into Intapp's Celeste AI platform. This collaboration aims to embed Moody's data within AI workflows for legal, private capital, and accounting professionals, broadening access to its analytics. For investors, this move demonstrates Moody's strategy to apply its risk data beyond traditional products, with the success of this integration vital for its long-term relevance in AI-driven data services.

feed.title: Summit Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SMMT) posts loss, eyes FDA decision
feed.summary: Summit Therapeutics reported a net loss of $215,700 for the quarter and $405,124 for the six months ended June 30, 2026, and acknowledged that its current liquidity is insufficient to fund operations for at least one year, raising substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. The company's strategy focuses on its bispecific antibody, ivonescimab, which is undergoing multiple Phase III trials, with a Biologics License Application accepted by the FDA for EGFR-mutated NSCLC, though the FDA has stated a statistically significant overall survival benefit is expected for approval. Summit is actively pursuing additional financing through various means including equity and debt offerings, collaborations, and licensing arrangements to support its ongoing research and development efforts and address its capital needs.

feed.title: Southern Missouri Bancorp Boosts Dividend Amid Strong Results
feed.summary: Southern Missouri Bancorp (SMBC) reported strong preliminary results for Q4 and full fiscal year 2026, with net income rising significantly, driven by higher net interest income and improved noninterest income. The company expanded gross loan balances and deposits, lifted tangible book value per share, and raised its quarterly dividend by 8% to $0.27 per share. SMBC is rated as an "Outperform" by TipRanks’ AI Analyst due to strong financial performance and a clear uptrend.

feed.title: Instacart and Tractor Supply Partner to Deliver for Life Outside
feed.summary: Instacart and Tractor Supply Company have announced a new nationwide partnership to offer same-day delivery from more than 2,400 Tractor Supply stores through the Instacart App and website. This collaboration allows customers to rapidly receive pet food and supplies, livestock feed, farm products, garden essentials, tools, and hardware without price markups. The partnership aims to bridge the last-mile gap for rural customers, making it easier for them to access essential products.

The company, a leading provider of data centers, shows strong growth potential and profitability with a high GF Score™ of 87/100, though its financial strength rating is moderate. Investors are showing confidence in DLR's growth, evidenced by a high P/E ratio, despite recent insider selling.

feed.title: Nokia's Massive AI Orders Overshadow Soft Guidance — BofA Sees 90% Upside
feed.summary: Bank of America has raised its price target for Nokia to $18.50, suggesting a 90% upside, despite the company's softer-than-expected Q3 guidance. This optimistic outlook is due to Nokia securing approximately €2.8 billion in AI-related orders in Q2, which BofA believes significantly surpasses expectations. While near-term revenue conversion might be delayed due to capacity constraints, analysts remain positive about Nokia's long-term growth prospects due to strong AI demand and infrastructure buildout.

feed.title: Judge Sets Final Judgment in Masimo v. Apple, Affirming Masimo's $634 Million Win; It Appeals
feed.summary: A judge has affirmed a jury's decision in the Masimo v. Apple lawsuit, awarding Masimo $634 million for patent infringement related to the '776 patent. Despite this apparent victory, Masimo has appealed the ruling, possibly seeking to expand their win or leverage another opportunity in the long-running legal battle. The judge sided with Apple on several trade secret and patent ownership claims, and Masimo's appeal suggests a continued strategic effort in this complex and contentious dispute.

feed.title: Sensient Technologies Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend, Payable on September 1, 2026

This dividend will be paid on September 1, 2026, to shareholders who are of record as of August 3, 2026. This announcement keeps Sensient's dividend consistent with previous declarations.

feed.title: Complement Your Core Portfolio Holdings With Income ETF SDSI
feed.summary: The American Century Short Duration Strategic Income ETF (SDSI) is presented as an active, core-plus income strategy suitable for investors seeking increased income, especially amid rising inflation or nearing retirement. It offers a 5.73% yield to maturity and a 4.74% 12-month distribution rate, actively investing in a range of securities including collateralized debt obligations and preferred stocks. The ETF has also delivered capital appreciation, returning 4.4% over the last year.
